description: anonymize a DICOM file by removing or replacing Protected Health Information (PHI) tags, writing a new de-identified DICOM
rules: read-only on the input .dcm — writes a NEW anonymized file, never mutates the input
PatientName/PatientID replaced (default ANONYMOUS), PatientBirthDate set to 19000101
other PHI tags (institution, physicians, descriptions, etc.) removed
degrades gracefully when pydicom is not importable
usage: Set DICOM_IN (input .dcm). Optional PATIENT_ID and PATIENT_NAME (replacement values, default ANONYMOUS). Output: anonymized.dcm under record_store.
limitation: Removes/replaces a fixed list of common PHI tags only; it does NOT re-generate UIDs and does NOT scrub PHI burned into pixel data or private tags. Verify de-identification before sharing. Requires pydicom; degrades to a placeholder if pydicom is absent.
